name: wipnote
description: wipnote — install via 'brew install wipnote', then run 'wipnote claude' in your project. This marketplace listing is retained for backward compatibility; new installs should use the binary distribution which bundles the plugin tree alongside the CLI.

plugins.name: wipnote
plugins.description: Local-first observability for AI-assisted development. Recommended install: 'brew install wipnote' (bundles plugin + CLI). This entry is kept so 'claude plugin update' continues working for existing installs; 'wipnote claude' loads the bundled tree via --plugin-dir and takes precedence.
